references.text: Leal, F, GC d'Eeckenbrugge & BK Holst. 1998. Taxonomy of the genera Ananas and Pseudananas—an historical review. Selbyana: 227-235.

species.citation: (L.) Merr. , Interpr. Herb. Amboin. (1917) 133 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 193; ≡ Bromelia comosa L. , Herb. Amboin. (Linn.) (1754) 21. = Ananas sativus Schult. & Schult.f. , Syst. Veg., 15th Ed. 7 (1830) 1283 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 137; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 194.
